title: ConnectorProfile
description: ConnectorProfile schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorProfileArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connector profile.

connectorProfileName.description: The name of the connector profile.

connectionMode.description: Indicates the connection mode and if it is public or private.

credentialsArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connector profile credentials.

connectorProfileProperties.description: The connector-specific properties of the profile configuration.

createdAt.description: Specifies when the connector profile was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Specifies when the connector profile was last updated.

privateConnectionProvisioningState.description: Specifies the private connection provisioning state.
